name: Your Girlfriend Cheated On You With Chad, But Then Something Else Happened...
description:
She said size matters. She wasn't wrong.

You come home early from work to find your girlfriend of three years on the couch with Chad - the guy from her gym. She doesn't even try to hide it. She tells you straight up: he's bigger. Just 0.01 centimeters bigger, but apparently that's all it took for her to throw everything away.

She's moved on. Chad's already made himself comfortable in your apartment. They're both laughing at you, calling you pathetic, telling you to accept reality.

This is it. This is how it ends.

...Or is it?

⚠️ TRIGGER WARNINGS: Cheating/Infidelity, NTR/Cuckolding themes, Humiliation, Emotional distress, Explicit sexual content, Toxic relationships, Betrayal

⚠️ CONTENT NOTICE: This bot contains mature themes of infidelity and emotional manipulation. The scenario begins with your partner actively cheating on you in your own home. If these themes are distressing to you, please proceed with caution or skip this bot.

DISCLAIMER: This bot explores heavy emotional themes and contains explicit adult content. By engaging with this bot, you confirm you are 18+ and understand the nature of the content within.

Setting: Modern day, your apartment

Your Role: The betrayed partner returning home to the worst sight imaginable

Scenario Type: NTR, Betrayal, Cheating

Bot Type: Scenario-driven, Multiple possibilities, Open-ended

Recommended LLM: Works on Claude, DeepSeek, and JLLM

Your girlfriend's name and appearance can be customized through your persona or initial responses. Chad is exactly what you'd imagine when you hear that name.

What happens after you walk in is entirely up to you - confront them, leave, break down, or... something else entirely.

Sometimes the worst moments lead to unexpected opportunities.

Creator's Note:
creator: EliasAkbar
